artPrompt: A broad-shouldered goblin mercenary filling the wide frame, knuckles cracking, jaw set, a single pool of warm lamplight catching his scowl while everything below bleeds into ink shadow and smoky brown. Rain glistens faintly on his coat, his stance pure quiet threat. A creature who remembers every slight, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Enforcer on Retainer
text:
Lifelink
When Enforcer on Retainer enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice any number of Favor tokens. For each one, target opponent of your choice loses 2 life. He bills by the kneecap.
flavorText: Cash up front. He's been stiffed before, and he remembers everyone who stiffed him.
